title: Asclepius — changelog
description: Cryptographically chained release history for the Asclepius clinical-AI trust substrate. Each entry references the previous hash; the changelog is itself a Merkle log.

items.title: v0.1.0 — The substrate, open-sourced.
items.summary: First public release. C++20 runtime with signed Merkle ledger, policy chain, drift detection, consent registry, and offline-verifiable evidence bundles. Apache 2.0.
items.content_text: First public release of the Asclepius runtime. Apache 2.0. C++20 with Runtime, Inference, Ledger, PolicyChain, DriftMonitor, ConsentRegistry, EvaluationHarness. Append-only Merkle ledger over SQLite WAL. BLAKE2b-256 + Ed25519. Policies: phi_scrubber, schema_validator, clinical_action_filter, length_limit. USTAR evidence bundles, signed manifest, offline-verifiable. Python bindings, CLI, three worked examples. 52 doctest cases / 687 assertions, all green.

items.title: v0.0.9 — Conformance: L1 audit suite green.
items.summary: Pinned the on-disk ledger format (spec.md v1) and ran the L1 conformance suite end-to-end.
items.content_text: Pinned the on-disk ledger format. Sign-input layout fixed. Drift severity bands tuned against published clinical-AI deployment data.

items.title: v0.0.7 — Evidence bundles ship.
items.summary: USTAR tar emit + offline-verify. Manifest signed by the ledger key.

items.title: v0.0.5 — Drift on the ground floor.
items.summary: DriftMonitor with PSI / KS / EMD on per-feature histograms.

items.title: v0.0.3 — Policy chain composed.
items.summary: First version of the PolicyChain with allow/modify/block verdicts.

items.title: v0.0.1 — Genesis. The Merkle ledger compiles.
items.summary: First commit. Append-only signed log over SQLite. verify() walks the chain.
